{{Otheruses|Abregado}}
"'''Abregado-Rae Intrigue'''" was an adventure for ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'', which appeared in the sourcebook [[No Disintegrations (West End Games)|''No Disintegrations'']].

==Plot summary==
The adventure opens with the players being accosted by a group of thugs working for the [[Devaronian/Legends|Devaronian]] [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[A'jidre Skrigatov]], [[Provincial Governor/Legends|Provincial Governor]] of [[Le Yer]] on [[Abregado-rae/Legends|Abregado-rae]]. He requests that they recover his missing fiancée whom he believes has been kidnapped by a political rival. After a great deal of searching, as well as encountering other hunters after the same target for different reasons, the players find the fiancée, [[Brinaloy N'Vaari]], but are at odds with what to do with her, since she is being forced into the marriage. The players can either return her to her fiancé, help her get offworld, or even help her win a write-in campaign for the position of provincial governor.
